problem id: a0847120
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11000111
  11010001 -> 00011110
  01010111 -> 10010011
  10010001 -> 10011100
  11111001 -> 01001111
  00110110 -> 00010011
  11111101 -> 01000111
  00010101 -> 10010101
  10011000 -> 11001110

query: 10111100
predicted answer: 10000111
